---
title: "Categorize Non-Personnel"
format: html
---

# Setup

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(glue)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)
library(writexl)
library(arrow)

options(scipen = 12, digits = 12)

path_data <- Sys.getenv("PATH_DATA")
year_fiscal <- Sys.getenv("YEAR_FISCAL")
```

# Import

```{r}
nonpersonnel <-
  read_parquet(glue("{path_data}/working/nonpersonnel_clean.parquet"))

personnel <-
  read_parquet(
    glue("{path_data}/working/personnel_categorized.parquet")
  ) |>
  distinct(
    categorization,
    costcenter_id, costcenter_name,
    position_id, position_title,
    employee_id, employee_name,
  )

accounts <-
  read_excel(
    glue("{path_data}/manual/accounts_categorization.xlsx"),
    col_types = c(rep("text", 2), rep("logical", 10))
  ) |>
  select(!account_name)

po <-
  read_excel(
    glue("{path_data}/manual/po_categorization.xlsx"),
    col_types = c(
      rep("text", 1), rep("logical", 1), rep("text", 5), rep("numeric", 9)
    )
  )
```

```{r}
dummy <-
  po |>
  distinct(po_number) |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(
    categorization = sample(c("direct", "indirect", "excluded"), size = 1)
  ) |>
  ungroup()

po <-
  po |>
  rows_patch(dummy, by = "po_number") |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("713"), names_to = "account_id", values_drop_na = TRUE
  ) |>
  select(po_number, account_id, po_categorization = categorization)
```

# Personnel Proportions

```{r}
nonpersonnel |>
  summarize(
    net_accounted = sum(net_accounted), .by = c(costcenter_name, costcenter_id)
  ) |>
  arrange(costcenter_name)
```

```{r}
costcenters_prop <-
  personnel |>
  count(costcenter_id, categorization) |>
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n), .by = c(costcenter_id)) |>
  select(!n) |>
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = c(costcenter_id),
    names_from = categorization,
    values_from = prop,
    values_fill = 0.0
  )

costcenters_prop
```

# Occupancy

Central

```{r}
occupancy_central <-
  personnel |>
  filter_out(
    costcenter_id %in% c(
      "SCHOOL",
      "40104" # schoolwide services division
    )
  ) |>
  filter_out(
    categorization == "direct" & costcenter_id %in% c(
      "40077", # office of operations
      "40232" # federal programs
    )
  ) |>
  count(categorization) |>
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) |>
  select(!n) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = categorization,
    values_from = prop,
    values_fill = 0.0
  ) |>
  mutate(is_occupancy_central = TRUE) |>
  rename(prop_central_direct = direct, prop_central_indirect = indirect)
```

Overall

```{r}
occupancy_overall <-
  personnel |>
  count(categorization) |>
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) |>
  select(!n) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = categorization,
    values_from = prop,
    values_fill = 0.0
  ) |>
  mutate(is_occupancy_overall = TRUE) |>
  rename(prop_overall_direct = direct, prop_overall_indirect = indirect)
```

# Categorization Amounts

```{r}
nonpersonnel_categorized <-
  nonpersonnel |>
  left_join(accounts, by = join_by(account_id)) |>
  left_join(po, by = join_by(po_number, account_id)) |>
  left_join(occupancy_central, by = join_by(is_occupancy_central)) |>
  left_join(occupancy_overall, by = join_by(is_occupancy_overall)) |>
  left_join(costcenters_prop, by = join_by(costcenter_id)) |>
  mutate(
    is_excluded = case_when(
      is_capital ~ TRUE,
      .default = is_excluded
    )
  ) |>
  mutate(
    amt_nonbudgetary = if_else(
      is_nonbudgetary, net_accounted, 0.00, missing = 0.00
    ),
    amt_unallowable = if_else(
      is_unallowable, net_accounted, 0.00, missing = 0.00
    )
  ) |>
  mutate(amt_excluded = case_when(
    is_nonbudgetary ~ 0.00,
    is_unallowable ~ 0.00,
    is_excluded ~ net_accounted,
    is_po & (
      is.na(po_categorization) | po_categorization == "excluded"
    ) ~ net_accounted,
    .default = 0.00
  )) |>
  mutate(amt_direct = case_when(
    is_nonbudgetary ~ 0.00,
    is_unallowable ~ 0.00,
    is_excluded ~ 0.00,
    is_po & po_categorization == "direct" ~ net_accounted,
    is_po ~ 0.00,
    !is_po & is_occupancy_central ~ net_accounted * prop_central_direct,
    !is_po & is_occupancy_overall ~ net_accounted * prop_overall_direct,
    .default = net_accounted * direct
  )) |>
  mutate(amt_indirect = case_when(
    is_nonbudgetary ~ 0.00,
    is_unallowable ~ 0.00,
    is_excluded ~ 0.00,
    is_po & po_categorization == "indirect" ~ net_accounted,
    is_po ~ 0.00,
    !is_po & is_occupancy_central ~ net_accounted * prop_central_indirect,
    !is_po & is_occupancy_overall ~ net_accounted * prop_overall_indirect,
    .default = net_accounted * indirect
  )) |>
  mutate(
    amt_total = (
      amt_nonbudgetary + amt_unallowable + amt_excluded + amt_direct + amt_indirect
    )
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(amt_total))
```

```{r}
nonpersonnel_categorized |>
  write_parquet(glue("{path_data}/working/nonpersonnel_categorized.parquet"))
```

# Diagnostics

```{r}
nonpersonnel |>
  pull(net_accounted) |>
  sum()

nonpersonnel_categorized |>
  pull(amt_total) |>
  sum()
```

```{r}
nonpersonnel_categorized |>
  filter(is_grant) |>
  group_by(grant_name, cfda) |>
  summarize(amt_total = sum(amt_total))

nonpersonnel_categorized |>
  filter(is_grant) |>
  group_by(account_name) |>
  summarize(amt_total = sum(amt_total))

nonpersonnel_categorized |>
  filter(is_grant) |>
  summarize(amt_total = sum(amt_total))
```

```{r}
Sys.time()
```
